description: This file defines Express.js route handlers for roles-related API endpoints, including fetching industries, skills, titles, autocomplete suggestions, and role search functionalities, with integrations to various services and repositories.

methods.name: _normalizeLabel
methods.description: Normalizes a display string by trimming whitespace and collapsing internal whitespace.

methods.name: _sortCaseInsensitive
methods.description: Compares two strings case-insensitively for sorting.

methods.name: _uiLakhsToApproxUsdDollars
methods.description: Converts salary in lakhs to an approximate USD dollar amount based on environment variable USD_TO_INR.

methods.name: _loadRolesForFilterOptions
methods.description: Loads roles from database or seed catalog to derive filter options.

methods.name: GET /api/roles/industries
methods.description: Returns distinct industry values for role filtering.

methods.name: GET /api/roles/skills
methods.description: Returns distinct skill values for role filtering.

methods.name: _deriveUniqueTitlesFromRoles
methods.description: Extracts and sorts unique role titles from role objects.

methods.name: GET /api/roles/titles
methods.description: Returns distinct role title values for filtering.

methods.name: GET /api/roles/job-titles
methods.description: Returns role titles in a backward-compatible format.

methods.name: GET /api/roles/autocomplete
methods.description: Provides role title suggestions for autocomplete, using Bedrock service.

methods.name: GET /api/roles/search
methods.description: Performs role search via Bedrock based on user input, with safe error handling.
